case_title: BANK OF AMERICA vs. CAMPBELL, IKE et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO C/A FOR PROPERTY AND TENANTS AT UNITS 327 AND 327 1/2 FILLMORE ST AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE

PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA SERVED JAN-09-1996, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THROUGH 10, INCLUSIVE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA AS TO DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, IKE

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BANK OF AMERICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMPBELL, IKE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 325 FILLMORE ST, INCLUDES ALL TENANTS, SUBTENANTS, NAMED CLAIMANTS, AND OTHER OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES- CCP 415.46.
